creator: michael.osipov@siemens.com
text:
(In reply to Sunpoet Po-Chuan Hsieh from comment #3)

Just updated the port on the server. The change itself is fine, but does not fix #230325. The dependency comes from the fact that we Tomcat committers assume that you compile Commons Daemon from the tarball and install it to CATALINA_HOME.
Right now, the daemon.sh is just useless because it won't find JSVC in CATALINA_HOME/bin.

Though, I'd consider this ticket is completed as such.
